site.footerTagline: Business development support and fractional BD leadership for accountancy firms — practical, human, and built around your values.

home.metaTitle: Hadley Advisors — Helping accountancy firms grow with confidence
home.metaDescription: Hadley Advisors helps accountancy firms build stronger pipelines, win better clients, and develop a business development culture that feels natural — not forced.

hero.subtitle: We help accountancy firms build stronger pipelines, win better clients, and develop a business development culture that feels natural — not forced. Growth doesn't come from scripts or pressure. It comes from clarity, confidence, and consistent action. That's where we come in.
hero.imageAlt: Modern architectural office atrium with natural light

whatWeDo.title: Four ways we help your firm grow.
whatWeDo.lead: Every engagement is shaped to your firm — but the work usually centres on these four areas.

cards.title: Build BD capability across your firm
cards.body: Coaching and frameworks that help partners, managers, and teams have better commercial conversations — without ever feeling salesy.

cards.title: Strengthen client relationships and retention
cards.body: A more deliberate client experience — so the relationships you've already earned drive loyalty, referrals, and steady fee growth.

cards.title: Improve pricing confidence and value communication
cards.body: Help your team price with confidence and articulate value clearly — so you stop leaving fees on the table.

cards.title: Lead commercial initiatives through fractional BD support
cards.body: Senior commercial leadership — without the full-time hire. We step in as your BD lead and keep the engine running.

whyUs.title: Because we understand your world.
whyUs.lead: We've worked inside accountancy firms — we know the pressures, the pace, and the realities of trying to grow while delivering exceptional client work.

items.title: Human, not transactional
items.body: We make business development feel human, achievable, and aligned with your values.

items.title: Practical, not theoretical
items.body: No jargon. No ego. Just practical support that moves your firm forward.

items.title: Specialist, not generalist
items.body: Built for accountancy firms — we know your client conversations, your fee dynamics, your team realities.

items.title: Confidence-building, not pressure
items.body: We help your team feel comfortable talking about value — and confident enough to keep doing it.

approach.title: Clarity, confidence, consistent action.
approach.lead: Growth that's sustainable usually follows the same rhythm: understand the firm, sharpen the focus, build the capability, then keep the momentum going.

steps.title: Listen and understand
steps.body: We start by understanding your firm, your clients, and what's quietly working — and what isn't.

steps.title: Sharpen the focus
steps.body: Clarity on positioning, target clients, pricing, and the BD priorities that actually matter for your firm.

steps.title: Build the capability
steps.body: Coaching, frameworks, and rituals that give partners and managers a way of working they'll actually keep up.

steps.title: Keep the momentum
steps.body: Light-touch support so commercial priorities don't slip when client work gets busy — which it always does.

testimonials.quote: Hadley brought structure to a conversation we'd been having for three years. Within a quarter we had a pipeline rhythm we could actually trust.
testimonials.name: [Client Name]

testimonials.quote: What I valued most was the honesty. We didn't get told what we wanted to hear — we got told what we needed to do, and how.
testimonials.name: [Client Name]

testimonials.quote: The capability building piece is what set this apart. Six months on, the team is still running the rhythm we built together.
testimonials.name: [Client Name]

ctaBand.title: Let's talk about what growth could look like for your firm.
ctaBand.body: A 30-minute conversation. No pitch deck, no obligation — just a focused chat about where you are and where you're trying to get to.

services.metaDescription: Business development support and fractional BD leadership for accountancy firms — plus client experience, pricing, and pipeline support.

header.title: Our core services for accountancy firms.
header.lead: Two core engagements — Business Development Support and Fractional BD Leadership — backed by three supporting services that strengthen specific parts of your commercial operation.

bdSupport.title: Practical, hands-on support to help your firm grow — without the awkwardness of traditional "sales training".
bdSupport.body: We work with partners, managers, and teams to build confidence, improve conversations, and create a healthier, more predictable pipeline.

howWeHelp.title: BD coaching
howWeHelp.body: For partners and managers, building confidence in commercial conversations.

howWeHelp.title: Pipeline and opportunity development
howWeHelp.body: Healthier pipelines, with the right opportunities at the right stage.

howWeHelp.title: Proposal and pitch support
howWeHelp.body: Sharper messaging and stronger positioning where it counts.

howWeHelp.title: Pricing and value communication
howWeHelp.body: Articulate value clearly and price with confidence.

howWeHelp.title: Relationship-building strategies
howWeHelp.body: Practical ways to deepen the relationships you already have.

howWeHelp.title: Client experience improvements
howWeHelp.body: The small shifts that turn good clients into loyal advocates.

outcomes: A team that understands how to grow the firm.

fractional.title: Senior-level commercial leadership — without the full-time hire.
fractional.body: We step in as your BD lead, driving growth initiatives, coaching your team, and ensuring commercial priorities stay on track.
fractional.bodyMuted: Perfect for firms that want to grow but don't have the internal capacity, capability, or clarity to drive BD consistently.

howWeHelp.title: Leading BD initiatives and campaigns
howWeHelp.body: Owning the strategy and execution, not just the slides.

howWeHelp.title: Setting commercial priorities and targets
howWeHelp.body: Clear focus, agreed across the partner group.

howWeHelp.title: Coaching partners and managers
howWeHelp.body: Building the people who will keep the engine running after we leave.

howWeHelp.title: Improving client experience and retention
howWeHelp.body: So the foundation under your growth keeps getting stronger.

howWeHelp.title: Supporting pricing, proposals, and key pursuits
howWeHelp.body: Hands-on involvement in the deals that matter most.

howWeHelp.title: Creating accountability and momentum
howWeHelp.body: The rhythm and reviews that make commercial progress visible.

outcomes: A BD engine that keeps running.

supporting.title: Targeted support where it matters most.
supporting.lead: Three focused services we deliver alongside — or independently of — our two core engagements.

cards.title: Client experience & retention
cards.body: Strengthen relationships, improve communication, and create a client journey that drives loyalty and referrals.

cards.title: Pricing & value communication
cards.body: Help your team price confidently and communicate value without discomfort.

cards.title: Pipeline & proposal support
cards.body: Improve pipeline quality and increase your win rate with clearer messaging and stronger positioning.

approach.title: How an engagement actually unfolds.
approach.lead: Each engagement is shaped to your firm — but the underlying rhythm is consistent. Listening first. Clarity that holds up. Capability that lasts.

steps.title: Listen and understand
steps.body: Conversations with partners, managers, and (where helpful) clients. An honest read of where the firm actually stands.

steps.title: Sharpen the focus
steps.body: Clarity on positioning, target clients, pricing, and commercial priorities — agreed by the people who will execute it.

steps.title: Build the capability
steps.body: Coaching, frameworks, and the rituals that make growth feel doable inside busy client-service teams.

steps.title: Run with you
steps.body: We sit alongside your team while the rhythm bedds in — real conversations, real reviews, quick course corrections.

steps.title: Embed and hand over
steps.body: The work belongs to your firm. We're easy to remove when the rhythm is running without us.

steps.title: Stay close
steps.body: Most firms keep us on a light advisory retainer afterwards — useful for tricky pursuits, partner reviews, and quiet counsel.

ctaBand.title: Not sure which fits? That's the conversation.
ctaBand.body: A 30-minute call is the easiest place to start. We'll listen, ask the questions that matter, and tell you straight whether we think we're the right partner.

about.metaDescription: Hadley Advisors was created to help accountancy firms grow in a way that feels authentic — rooted in relationships, clarity, and confidence.

header.title: A specialist approach to business development for accountancy firms.
header.lead: Hadley Advisors was created to help accountancy firms grow in a way that feels authentic. We believe business development should feel natural — rooted in relationships, clarity, and confidence — not scripts or pressure.

founder.name: [Founder Name]
founder.paragraph1: Our background is in accountancy. We've led teams, shaped client experience, and helped firms turn relationships into revenue. We understand the realities: the time pressure, the confidence gaps, the fee pressure, and the desire to grow without compromising your values.
founder.paragraph2: [Optional founder paragraph — a sentence or two on the through-line of your career, the kinds of firms you've worked with, and the conviction that started Hadley Advisors. Keep it human; avoid CV-speak.]
founder.paragraph3: [Optional personal sentence — where you're based, what you care about outside work, what clients tend to say about working with you.]

philosophy.title: Five principles that shape every engagement.
philosophy.lead: Every engagement is shaped to the firm. These are the things that don't change.

values.title: Human.
values.body: BD is about people, not selling. We work with how your team naturally operates.

values.title: Practical.
values.body: Clear steps, real conversations, measurable progress. No theory for theory's sake.

values.title: Commercial.
values.body: Growth that's sustainable and profitable — not vanity activity that doesn't move fees.

values.title: Collaborative.
values.body: We work with you, not over you. Your judgment, your firm, our experience.

values.title: Confidence-building.
values.body: Helping teams feel comfortable talking about value — and confident enough to keep doing it.

belief.title: Accountancy firms don't need to become "salesy" to grow.
belief.lead: They need clarity, confidence, and a consistent approach to business development. We help firms build the capability and momentum they need to grow with intention.

ctaBand.title: Let's talk about your goals.
ctaBand.body: A 30-minute conversation is the easiest way to find out if we're the right partner — for both of us.

insights.metaDescription: Notes, frameworks, and short essays from Hadley Advisors on growth, BD, and client experience for accountancy firms.

header.title: Field notes from inside accountancy firms.
header.lead: Short essays, frameworks, and observations on what actually moves the needle for accountancy firms — BD, client experience, pricing, and the realities of growing without becoming "salesy".

posts.title: Why "salesy" is the wrong fear for accountants.
posts.body: Most partners worry they'll come across as pushy. The real risk is the opposite — being so quiet your clients don't realise what else you could do for them.

posts.title: The conversation that quietly costs accountancy firms thousands.
posts.body: It's the fee discussion you avoid having upfront. Here's a small reframe that makes it dramatically easier — for you and for the client.

posts.title: Building a BD rhythm partners will actually keep.
posts.body: The secret isn't a CRM. It's a 45-minute weekly ritual designed for people who'd rather be doing client work.

posts.title: The client experience signals partners almost always miss.
posts.body: The small moments that quietly decide whether a client refers you, expands the relationship — or starts looking elsewhere.

posts.title: What separates a strong proposal from a forgettable one.
posts.body: It isn't the design. A practical look at the framing decisions that change how clients value your work — and your fees.

posts.title: The four numbers every accountancy firm should track weekly.
posts.body: Forget vanity metrics. These four numbers tell you the truth about whether your growth engine is actually running.

ctaBand.title: Want these notes when they land?
ctaBand.body: The simplest way is a short email. We'll set up a proper subscription form when you've chosen a provider.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Hadley Advisors. Start a conversation about how business development could feel different for your accountancy firm.

header.title: Let's start a conversation.
header.lead: A 30-minute conversation is the easiest way to understand whether we're the right partner. No pitch deck, no obligation — just a focused chat about where your firm is and where you're trying to get to.

info.title: Get in touch.
info.body: Tell us a little about your firm and what's prompting the conversation. We aim to reply within one business day.

ctaBand.title: Prefer to read first?
ctaBand.body: Have a look at the services or the field notes — and come back with sharper questions.
